title: Torbin (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Torbin-Databank.png|thumb|right|250px|Torbin, as a Padawan learner]]
'''Torbin''' may refer to one of the following:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*'''[[Torbin]]''', a [[Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Torbin's parents]]''', the [[parent]]s of Torbin

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'''==
*'''[[Torbin (Grand Moff)|Torbin]]''', a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]
*'''[[Torbin (smuggler)|Torbin]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]
*'''[[Laddinare Torbin]]''', a [[Grand Inquisitor/Legends|Grand Inquisitor]]

==See also==
*'''[[Tobin]]'''
*'''[[Torben]]''', a member of the [[Scyre]] clan
